Vendored third-party frontend assets for docs.

Included files:
- `popper.min.js` from `@popperjs/core` version `2.11.8`
- `tippy-bundle.umd.min.js` and `tippy.css` from `tippy.js` version `6.3.7`

Licenses:
- Popper: MIT (`LICENSE.popper.js`)
- Tippy.js: MIT (`LICENSE.tippy.js`)

Sources:
- https://unpkg.com/@popperjs/core@2.11.8/dist/umd/popper.min.js
- https://unpkg.com/@popperjs/core@2.11.8/LICENSE.md
- https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6.3.7/dist/tippy-bundle.umd.min.js
- https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6.3.7/dist/tippy.css
- https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6.3.7/LICENSE
